category_sources: source_facts.description says PDF processor written in Go; official site describes pdfcpu as a PDF processor API and CLI.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pdfcpu; official site and GitHub repository use pdfcpu.
docs_sources: Official site is a dedicated documentation surface with sections for getting started and commands; official GitHub README links to pdfcpu.io and includes CLI/API information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/pdfcpu/pdfcpu; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official site identify a Go PDF processor; official README describes both API and CLI support, including encryption and many PDF operations.
